chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.93 of 2024 Trading Corporation of Pakistan (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus Shahbuddin & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as notices could not be issued as appellant’s counsel has not supplied the copies nor paid the process fee. Dated: 23.04.2024 Ms. Atya Manzoor holds brief for Mr. Fayaz Ali Metlo for appellant. -.-.- Although the matter is fixed for non-prosecution, however Ms. Atya Manzoor holding brief for Mr. Fayaz Ali Metlo, learned counsel appearing for appellant, submits that she has been instructed not to press this appeal along with pending applications. Order accordingly. Judge Judge
